title: Gantt / Calendar Widget - Hiding Subitems Assigned to Other People
excerpt:

Problem:

posts.author: kevinkamis (Kevin Kamis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Problem:
When a person is assigned a subitem, all the other subitems that are assigned to other people, show up on their Calendar and Gantt widget view.

Context:
We use the Calendar and Gantt widget to view active projects. 3 boards, Website Design, Graphic Design, and Videography. Projects are listed as Items. Tasks are listed as subitems of the parent project.

Call To Action:
Ant way to only show sub-items that are assigned to you?

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
This can hopefully be solved when subitems will finally be included in advanced filters. They were planned for a release at the beginning of this year: Subitems Product Plan

So far there are no new information. In any case they have not yet been released.
